context: Tests whether the answer gives an incremental architecture migration plan grounded in modern Observation and module boundaries.

checklist.name: Observation Migration
checklist.description: Describes replacing ObservableObject/@Published with @Observable where iOS 17+ or equivalent platform support is available.

checklist.name: SwiftUI Ownership
checklist.description: Explains State for owned observable objects, plain properties for read-only injected observable objects, and Bindable only when bindings are needed.

checklist.name: MainActor Safety
checklist.description: Notes that UI-observed @Observable app state should be isolated to @MainActor for Swift 6 data-race safety.

checklist.name: Coordinator Preservation
checklist.description: Keeps Coordinators for UIKit or hybrid complex navigation and does not force their immediate removal.

checklist.name: VIPER Boundary
checklist.description: Treats VIPER as a legacy or strict-boundary maintenance pattern, not as the default for new SwiftUI modules.

checklist.name: Module Consistency
checklist.description: Allows different architecture patterns by feature module while requiring consistency inside each module.

checklist.name: Sibling Handoffs
checklist.description: Routes detailed concurrency diagnostics, SwiftUI navigation implementation, and test-suite mechanics to swift-concurrency, swiftui-navigation, and swift-testing.
